zh.Corby Castle, Cumberland, England: 英國波藍德可比 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Salkeld II於1353年出生在英國波藍德可比 卡素時，他的父親Hugh Salkeld13歲，母親Christiana Rosgill13歲。他於1379年之前與Margaret Tymparon在英國波藍德武洛可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1440年在英國維斯特莫藍德洛斯吉爾享年87歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh Salkeld II于1353年出生在英国波藍德可比 卡素时，他的父亲Hugh Salkeld13岁，母亲Christiana Rosgill13岁。他于1379年之前与Margaret Tymparon在英国波藍德武洛可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1440年在英国維斯特莫藍德洛斯吉爾享年87岁。

nameMeanings.name: Salkeld
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Salkeld (Cumberland), probably from Old English salh ‘willow, sallow’ + hylte ‘wood’, though the final element may have been confused with Old Norse kelda ‘spring, marshy place’. Alternatively, the final element may be an Old English hilde, a variant of helde ‘slope’. This surname has been present (though never common) in Ireland for centuries.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Salkeld II was born in 1353, in Corby Castle, Cumberland, England, his father, Hugh Salkeld, was 13 and his mother, Christiana Rosgill, was 13. He married Margaret Tymparon before 1379, in Ullock, Cumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1440, in Rosgill, Westmorland, England, at the age of 87.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Salkeld II est né en 1353, à Corby Castle, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Salkeld, avait 13 ans et sa mère, Christiana Rosgill, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Tymparon avant 1379, à Ullock, Cumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1440, à Rosgill, Westmorland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 87 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Salkeld II 1353 in Corby Castle, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh Salkeld 13 und seine Mutter Christiana Rosgill 13. Er hat vor 1379 in Ullock, Cumberland, England Margaret Tymparon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1440 im Alter von 87 Jahren in Rosgill, Westmorland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Salkeld II è nato il nel 1353 nel Corby Castle, Cumberland, England, il suo padre, Hugh Salkeld, aveva 13 anni e il suo madre, Christiana Rosgill, aveva 13 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Tymparon prima del 1379, nel Ullock, Cumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1440, nel Rosgill, Westmorland, England, all'età di 87 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Salkeld IIが1353年にイギリスクウンバーランドコルビー カストルで生まれた時，父Hugh Salkeldは13歳，母Christiana Rosgillは13歳であった。1379年以前にイギリスクウンバーランドウロックでMargaret Tymparonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1440年にイギリスウエストモーランドロスジルで87歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Salkeld II(이)가 1353년 영국 c벌랜드 코르비 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Salkeld(은)는 13세였고, 그의 어머니 Christiana Rosgill(은)는 13세였다. 그는 1379년 이전 영국 c벌랜드 울록에서 Margaret Tymparon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1440년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 로스길에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Salkeld II nasceu em 1353, em Corby Castle, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Salkeld, tinha 13 anos e sua mãe, Christiana Rosgill, tinha 13 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Tymparon antes 1379, em Ullock, Cumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1440, em Rosgill, Westmorland, Inglaterra, com 87 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Salkeld II родился в 1353 г. в местности корби кастл, кумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh Salkeld было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Christiana Rosgill, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Tymparon перед 1379 г. в местности уллокк, кумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1440 г. в местности росгилл, вестморланд, Англия в возрасте 87 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh Salkeld II nació en 1353, en Corby Castle, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh Salkeld, tenía 13 años y su mamá, Christiana Rosgill, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Margaret Tymparon antes de 1379, en Ullock, Cumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1440, en Rosgill, Westmorland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 87 años.
